sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97472" key="*subari/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σῠβαρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n97472.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live like a Sybarite</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluptuary</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
